action.reasoning: Observation: training failed immediately because the dataset path assumption was wrong; /data exists but protocol files are not at its root. Analysis: likely the actual mount is nested under /data or exposed via RAB_DATA_DIR differently. We need to inspect filesystem, make path resolution robust, then rerun a short baseline and submit eval as required. Decision: update train/predict to auto-resolve dataset roots and save feature extractor locally for offline eval, inspect /data layout, then train 3 epochs and submit eval.
